messages.content: convert this into english char and make it meaningful पिछले 10 सालों में आपको न जाने कितने ऑफर आए होंगे यहां। वहां से ये कर लो, ये कर लो, मर्जी। मांगे पैसे मिले होगे। आप कितने कम क्यों दिखे? आपने कैसे रोका अपने आप को मैंने भी।यह चीज मैंने भी थोड़े आमिर खान टाइप हो गए ना। पर कम दिखते हैं। मुझे लगा पंचायत क्यों नहीं आ रहा अभी तक। कब आएगा?उसका पोस्ट पर काम चल रहा था।भाई अब आप कम काम क्यों करते भाई? नहीं वह वह शुरू से रहा है।मतलब वह टीवीएफ में भी होता था कि बहुत। जब एक टाइम के बाद बहुत सारे वीडियो हम लोग बना रहे थे तो मैं कहता था कि यार थोड़ा टाइम लेकर बनानी चाहिए चीजें थोड़ा अच्छे से वरना फिर वह छपाई जो वर्ड है वह थोड़ा पसंद कम है।

In the past ten years, you must have received countless offers from here and there, saying "do this, do that, as you please." You must have been offered money to take up these offers. How come you appear to do so little work? How have you managed to hold yourself back? I've done the same. We've become a bit like Aamir Khan, haven't we? But we're less visible. I was wondering why 'Panchayat' hasn't come out yet. When will it release? Post-production work was going on.

Why do you work so little, brother? No, it’s always been like that from the start. Even in TVF (The Viral Fever), it was the same. When we used to make a lot of videos at one point, I would say that we should take some time to make things a bit better, otherwise the quality of the work, which I am less keen on, feels a bit rushed.

🔥 Don't miss a moment of this engaging podcast highlight with Bharti Singh and Harsh Lambhichiya, where Jeetu opens up about his selective approach to projects, reminiscent of #AamirKhan's philosophy, and why he chooses quality over quantity.

🎬 Get a sneak peek into the behind-the-scenes action and learn why Jeetu favors taking his time to create content that resonates with audiences. Find out what keeps him grounded despite the countless offers that come his way in the glitzy world of entertainment.

🌟 Stay tuned for updates on Jeetu's latest ventures and discover the reasons behind his minimalistic yet impactful screen presence.
